news.headline: Landmark Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: LARK) to announce Q3 earnings on Oct 30, with conference call on Oct 31 at 10:00 am CT. Call number: (833) 470-1428, access code 242414.
news.summary: In Manhattan, Kansas, Landmark Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: LARK) revealed its plan to unveil its third-quarter 2024 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, October 30, 2024. A conference call is scheduled for Thursday, October 31, 2024, at 10:00 am (Central Time) to delve into these financial results. Interested investors can participate in the earnings call by dialing (833) 470-1428 and entering the access code 242414. To ensure a smooth connection, investors are advised to dial in at least 5 minutes before the call commences.

news.headline: JPMorgan analyst sees strong Q3 earnings from mid/small-cap banks, expects further upside into 2025. Regional bank stocks beat EPS estimates with NIM and NII driving outperformance.
news.summary: The U.S. regional banking sector is performing well as mid- and small-cap banks have shown stronger-than-expected third-quarter earnings. JPMorgan analyst Anthony Elian noted widespread earnings beats and positive outlooks, indicating upside potential into 2025. Key factors contributing to this strength include Fed's gradual rate cuts, yield curve de-inverting, improved credit quality, possible capital returns, and investor underweight positioning. Seven regional banks in JPMorgan's coverage have reported results, with five beating core EPS estimates, driven by strong net interest margins and income. The SPDR Regional Banking ETF has outperformed as a result, suggesting a favorable outlook for regional banks.

news.headline: Civitas Capital breaks ground on 76-unit multifamily community in North Park neighborhood of San Diego.
news.summary: In Dallas on October 23, 2024, Civitas Capital Group, an alternative investment manager, initiated construction on a Class A multifamily community in San Diego, California with 76 units. The company focuses on niche opportunities in U.S. real estate and expressed great enthusiasm for this project.

news.headline: CP Group and DRA Advisors lease nearly 100,000 SF at CapRock in Bethesda, MD after $12+ million renovation in 2022.
news.summary: A leading office property owner-operator, CP Group, in collaboration with DRA Advisors, revealed a significant achievement in Bethesda, Md., securing nearly 100,000 square feet in leasing activity at CapRock. The office campus, spanning 709,313 square feet across three buildings, witnessed a surge in leasing post the rebranding by CP Group and a substantial $12+ million capital improvement initiative after its acquisition in 2022. The lease agreements encompass five new tenants, showcasing a robust leasing momentum at the property.

news.headline: Executives stress urgency for energy transition to achieve goals quickly.
Legal battle ends as court prohibits the ban on political AI deepfakes, testing free speech rights.
DigitalOcean partners with Hugging Face to offer 1-Click Models powered by HUGS, enabling easy ML model deployment.
news.summary: In an update from New York, DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DOCN) has revealed a significant collaboration with Hugging Face, a prominent open-source platform for aiding in the development and training of machine learning (ML) models. This venture introduces a key feature: the introduction of 1-Click Models supported by Hugging Face's HUGS (Hugging Face GenAI Services). This enhancement enables users to promptly deploy the top third-party model options with ease.

news.headline: Sapia.ai launches Phai™, an AI career coach accessible via API, providing personalized career guidance for job seekers and employees.
news.summary: In Mentor, Ohio, Sapia.ai has introduced Phai™, a new mobile AI career coach accessed through an API. This innovative tool provides customized career advice and support for individuals searching for jobs or looking to advance in their current roles. Phai™ aims to enhance talent mobility and career development, offering a personalized approach to help users navigate their professional growth.

news.headline: Axway acquires Sopra Banking Software to enhance open banking solution. CFPB finalizes US open banking rule to drive adoption of API technologies, unlocking new opportunities.
news.summary: In Phoenix, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) has approved a groundbreaking U.S. open banking rule. This rule is poised to transform the industry by compelling banks to integrate API technologies. This move not only ensures the longevity of their operations but also opens up lucrative business prospects. Axway's acquisition of SBS reinforces their dedication to advancing open banking. Through incorporating SBS's cutting-edge technology, Axway aims to solidify their position in this evolving landscape.

news.headline: Evolve Bank returns funds to Synapse Brokerage's end users affected by bankruptcy with Rust Consulting as administrator.
news.summary: Evolve Bank & Trust has disclosed its plans to return funds to Synapse Brokerage end users affected by the Synapse bankruptcy. The bank will be working with Rust Consulting, an Exela Technologies brand, as the administrator to oversee the distribution and payment processes. Funds that have been held by Evolve since the Synapse bankruptcy will be disbursed to the impacted end users. The announcement aims to alleviate the frustration experienced by those involved.

news.headline: UiPath recognizes innovative customer successes in AI and automation with AI25 Awards program.
news.summary: The winners of the UiPath AI25 Awards program, which celebrates the most innovative customer achievements in AI and automation, were recently revealed by UiPath in New York and Las Vegas.

news.headline: Q1-Q3 2024 Interim Financial Report released with significant figures.
Apple and Goldman Sachs face $90 million penalties for Apple Card investigation findings, including customer refunds.
news.summary: The Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has imposed penalties and mandated customer refunds in relation to an investigation into Apple Card, issued by Goldman Sachs. This action comes following an inquiry into the credit card service, emphasizing issues with customer protection and financial regulations. The penalties amount to [specific amount], with a significant portion dedicated to reimbursing affected customers. The investigation sheds light on potential discrepancies in the operations and compliance measures of the financial institution and its partnership with the tech giant.

news.headline: California Catalysts secures $3M in Series A-2 funding to advance hydrogen electrolyzer components.
news.summary: California Catalysts, formerly known as H2U Technologies, a leading developer of cutting-edge electrolyzer materials, has recently completed a $3 million Series A-2 financing round in Chatsworth, California.

news.headline: Cosmology launches Hyperweb, TypeScript ecosystem, enabling dApp development for millions of developers.
news.summary: A new TypeScript ecosystem called Hyperweb has been launched in San Francisco on October 23, 2024. It is designed to facilitate dApp development for numerous developers. Cosmology introduced this ecosystem with the aim of providing an end-to-end solution for blockchain development. Hyperweb aims to transform the development process by enabling millions of developers to build decentralized applications seamlessly. The ecosystem promises to revolutionize the blockchain space by offering a comprehensive solution for TypeScript developers.

news.headline: Pure Fishing, a global fishing tackle leader, closes refinancing deal for outstanding debt. Owned by Sycamore Partners.
news.summary: On October 23, 2024, in Columbia, South Carolina, Pure Fishing Inc., a top player in the fishing tackle sector and a portfolio company of Sycamore Partners, revealed the successful completion of a refinancing deal for its existing debt. This move marks a significant step for the Company in managing its financial obligations.

news.headline: AANA enhances ERAS policy, improving patient outcomes. Updated guidelines aim to support recovery after surgery.
news.summary: Rosemont, Illinois - On October 23, 2024, the American Association of Nurse Anesthesiology (AANA) approved updated policy considerations for Enhanced Recovery after Surgery (ERAS) to improve patient outcomes. The ERAS pathway focuses on pathway development and has shown to positively impact patient recovery. The implementation of ERAS has resulted in a significant increase in successful patient outcomes, with a growth rate of 15% in hospitals utilizing the pathway. The AANA's endorsement of ERAS showcases a commitment to advancing postoperative care for patients.

news.headline: Adina Abramowitz awarded 2024 Ned Gramlich Award posthumously for finance contributions. OFN honors her legacy.
news.summary: In a recent event in Los Angeles on October 23, 2024, Opportunity Finance Network (OFN) bestowed its highest honor upon Abramowitz for his significant impact on the community development finance sector. OFN, known as the primary network and intermediary in the country, recognized Abramowitz's influence during the ceremony. This acknowledgment highlights his notable contributions to the industry and marks a significant achievement for the recipient.

news.headline: Vantiva and e& Deploy first eSIM-enabled 5G fixed wireless access gateway in UAE, improves service area by 40%.
news.summary: Vantiva, a global technology leader (Euronext Paris: VANTI), has unveiled upgraded Customer Premise Equipment that boosts wireless service area by 40%. The new equipment also features self-installation capabilities and automated antenna optimization. This advancement is poised to enhance connectivity for Network Service Providers, catering to a wider demographic and improving efficiency for users.

news.headline: BPM LLP hosts Showcase Event at Las Vegas Golden Knights game to celebrate one-year anniversary, one of 35 largest firms.
news.summary: In honor of the one-year anniversary of the merger of FAL, BPM LLP, a top 35 public accounting and advisory firm in the U.S., is marking the occasion with a special Showcase Event during the Las Vegas Golden Knights hockey game. This event coincides with the firm's successful integration and will be a first-of-its-kind celebration. The merger has solidified BPM LLP's position as a major player in the industry, with the firm now recognized as one of the largest public accounting and advisory firms in the country. The event is set to take place on Oct. 23, 2024, and will be a significant moment for the firm as it highlights its growth and achievements over the past year.

news.headline: Coffey Anderson to headline Nashville Veterans Day event benefiting The Mission Continues, St. Louis, Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A charity concert featuring top celebrities will raise funds for The Mission Continues, a national non-profit supporting veterans. Taking place in St. Louis on October 23, 2024, The Mission Continues deploys veterans throughout the US to aid underprivileged communities. This initiative aims to bring attention to the valuable work done by the organization.

news.headline: Puerto Rico Wine & Food Festival April 3-6, 2025 in San Juan. Showcases island's rich cuisine, unites global culinary community.
news.summary: The first-ever festival will highlight the diverse flavors and heritage of the island, bringing together the culinary community to support educational and philanthropic initiatives. Set in San Juan, Puerto Rico, the event on October 23, 2024, will showcase the rich culinary culture of the island. This festival will not only celebrate Puerto Rico's vibrant food scene but also unite gastronomy enthusiasts worldwide.

news.headline: Highspot and Corporate Visions collaborate for new integrations to enhance training capabilities. SEATTLE, Oct. 22, 2024.
news.summary: Corporate Visions and Highspot announced that Corporate Visions' "Great 8™" Competency Map and Skills Coaching Samples will be featured as free content in Highspot's new Skills and Competency Capabilities. This collaboration was revealed on October 22, 2024, in Seattle. Highspot is recognized as the sole GTM enablement platform, while Corporate Visions is a top player in the sector. This partnership will allow users access to valuable resources for enhancing their skills and competencies.

news.headline: Jones Capital invests in Alta Arbor, expanding its portfolio in horticulture businesses, marking a significant step.
news.summary: In Houston on October 23, 2024, Jones Capital completed a strategic investment in Alta Arbor, demonstrating its dedication to growing its investment portfolio. Alta Arbor focuses on investing in horticulture businesses, highlighting a significant milestone in its expansion efforts.

news.headline: Law requires disclosure of large shareholders in issuers whose shares trade on regulated market.
news.summary: Under the Law of May 2, 2007, Article 14(1) requires the disclosure of large shareholders in companies whose shares are traded on regulated markets. This legislation aims to promote transparency and accountability in the financial sector by ensuring that any individual or entity holding a significant stake in such companies is publicly identified. This law is crucial for monitoring ownership structures and preventing undue influence in the market. It is a significant step towards maintaining fair and efficient trading environments.

news.headline: Hybrid Software maintains steady performance in Q3 with continued growth.
Avery Dennison Q3 earnings beat at $2.33 EPS but revenue falls short at $2.18 billion. Operating margin at 14.5%.
news.summary: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) exceeded expectations in the third quarter with adjusted earnings per share of $2.33, slightly surpassing the projected $2.32. However, quarterly revenues fell short, reaching $2.18 billion as opposed to the estimated $2.20 billion consensus from analysts. The Materials Group experienced a 3% increase in reported sales, reaching $1.5 billion, with operating and adjusted EBITDA margins of 14.5% and 17.0% respectively, similar to the previous year. On the other hand, the Solutions Group saw reported sales climb by 7% to $686 million.

news.headline: Global e-cigarette market valued at $18.98B in 2023, expected to reach $23.15B by 2029, with key players dominating industry.
news.summary: A recent report on the e-cigarette market indicates significant growth potential. Valued at USD 18.98 billion in 2023, the market is projected to reach USD 23.15 billion by 2029, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 3.37%. The industry is highly competitive and led by major players who have a significant impact on market trends. The market is mainly influenced by large multinational companies, indicating a concentrated market landscape.

news.headline: Fed's Barkin does not comment on the economy or monetary policy in prepared remarks on community colleges.

CBC Bancorp and Bay Community Bancorp have achieved a major milestone in their proposed merger, with all regulatory agencies approving the deal. The merger involves CBC Bancorp, the holding company for Commercial Bank of California, and Bay Community Bancorp, the holding company for Community Bank of Bay.
news.summary: The merger between CBC Bancorp, the holding company for Commercial Bank of California (CBC), and Bay Community Bancorp (OTC Pink: CBOBA), the holding company for Community Bank of the... based in Irvine and Oakland, California, has been officially approved by all regulatory agencies. This significant development was finalized on October 23, 2024. The successful merger combines the resources and operations of both entities, paving the way for enhanced financial services for their customers.

news.headline: Is a 'lost decade' looming for U.S. stocks? One strategist debates, conflicting with popular opinion.
$AAPL Apple industry analyst cited on X: iPhone 16 orders to be cut by 10 million units going into 2025.
Residential Bathroom Pods Market expected to grow to $1816.8 million by 2030 at 8.3% CAGR, with various segment options.
news.summary: In Bangalore, India, a report released on October 23, 2024, discusses the Residential Bathroom Pods Market, which is categorized by type into GRP, steel, and concrete types, and by application into student housing, healthcare facilities, residential buildings, and apartments. The report provides a Global Opportunity Analysis and Industry Forecast for the market spanning from 2024 to 2029.

news.headline: Cost of owning homes in Germany declines after reaching record levels.
Bureau Veritas acquires Aligned Incentives, expanding sustainability services with AI solutions. Enhances Scope 3 emissions analysis.
news.summary: In Paris, Bureau Veritas, a prominent company offering testing, inspection, and certification services globally, revealed its acquisition of Aligned Incentives. The latter is a cutting-edge provider of sustainability planning solutions driven by artificial intelligence (AI). This acquisition aims to bolster Bureau Veritas' expertise in Scope 3 emissions analysis and life cycle assessment (LCA). Aligned Incentives is distinguished for its advanced AI technology and profound knowledge in sustainability metrics, making it a leading player in the field.

news.headline: Pirelli introduces Scorpion XTM line with aggressive tread pattern for off-road capabilities, 55K-mile warranty, 3-peak mountain snowflake rating.
news.summary: Pirelli introduces a new tire with an aggressive tread pattern, promising exceptional off-road capabilities on all terrains. The tire comes with a 55,000-mile limited warranty, ensuring durability and top performance for the diverse American roads. It boasts a 3-peak mountain snowflake rating, indicating suitability for snowy conditions. The announcement was made in New York on October 23, 2024.

news.headline: $250 million to be awarded by Biden administration for affordable housing development.
FFW Corporation reported quarterly earnings, parent company of Crossroads Bank, ending September 30, 2024. Stock closed at $39.50.
news.summary: In Wabash, Indiana, on October 23, 2024, FFW Corporation declared its financial results for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. The parent company of Crossroads Bank revealed earnings data. FFW Corporation is listed on OTC PINK under the symbol FFWC, with a closing price of $39.50 on October 22, 2024.

news.headline: Bureau Veritas buys Aligned Incentives, a leader in enterprise sustainability planning, boosting global services with AI tech.
Dow Jones declines with McDonald's E. Coli issue; Warren Buffett warns investors. Boeing and Tesla also affected.
news.summary: Today, the Dow Jones experienced a decline on the stock market. Interestingly, renowned investor Warren Buffett issued a cautionary message to investors. Boeing faced a decrease in its performance following its earnings report, whereas Tesla is on the horizon. Furthermore, McDonald's also suffered a setback as its stock dipped due to an E. Coli-related issue. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: PGD Airport seeks bids for $200,000 reimbursement on restaurant buildout to meet growing demand.
news.summary: In Punta Gorda, Florida, as of October 23, 2024, Punta Gorda Airport has put out a call for bids for a public full-service restaurant, bar, and caterer at the PGD Air Center. There is a strong demand for food service from employees, local residents, and aviators, with the need increasing in line with the growth in commercial and residential activities at the airport.

news.headline: GE Aerospace partners with Lilium to enhance eVTOL safety. They will develop a FDM/FOQA program, offer FDM for customers. Event Measurement System used in Lilium's POWER-ON program.
news.summary: GE Aerospace and Lilium N.V. have joined forces to establish a robust safety standard for electric Vertical Take-Off and Landing (eVTOL) aircrafts, as they approach their commercial debut. The collaboration involves the development of an Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) level Flight Data Monitoring (FDM) or Flight Operations Quality Assurance (FOQA) initiative for monitoring eVTOL safety across the entire fleet. Additionally, GE Aerospace and Lilium aim to introduce an optional FDM program for Lilium’s clients. GE’s Event Measurement System platform is set to be a vital component of Lilium’s aftermarket initiative known as “POWER-ON,” which is designed to provide secure, efficient, and client-centric solutions.

news.headline: FDA approves Pfizer's Abrysvo vaccine for adults under 60 to prevent RSV. It's the only vaccine for pregnant people as well.
news.summary: Pfizer Inc's Abrysvo (RSVpreF vaccine) has been approved by the FDA for individuals aged 18-59 at high risk, to prevent lower respiratory tract disease caused by RSV. This extends the vaccine's indication to the broadest for adults, including those previously aged 60 and older. Abrysvo is also the only RSV immunization authorized for pregnant individuals at gestation weeks 32-36, safeguarding infants up to 6 months old. The FDA's decision was influenced by the pivotal Phase 3 MONeT study.

news.headline: Bureau Veritas reports strong Q3 2024 with EUR 1,547.9 million revenue (up 8.8% YoY), 13.0% organic growth across all sectors.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, Neuilly-sur-Seine, France, reported key figures for the quarter, including a revenue of EUR 1,547.9 million. This marked an 8.8% increase year-on-year and a 13.0% organic growth. All business sectors experienced significant organic growth compared to the same quarter in 2023. Industry showed a growth of +23.8%, Certification at +17.7%, Marine & Offshore at +13.2%, Buildings & Infrastructure at +9.3%, Agri-Food & Commodities at +8.5%, and Consumer Products Services at +7.5%. Additionally, there was a positive scope effect of 0.5% during the period.

news.headline: Amplify has launched the Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (SMAP), targeting the growing small and mid-cap market. Small-caps are up 6.97% YTD and 29.72% in a year, while mid-caps have gained 13.39% YTD and 32.56% in a year.
news.summary: Investors now have the chance to delve into small- and mid-cap companies with the recent launch of the Amplify Small-Mid Cap Equity ETF (NYSE: SMAP). This ETF arrives at a favorable time, as small- and mid-cap stocks have been performing better than their larger counterparts. Year-to-date, small-cap stocks, as represented by the iShares Core S&P Small-Cap ETF (NYSE: IJR), have seen a 6.97% increase and a 29.72% rise over the past year. Meanwhile, mid-cap stocks, tracked by the iShares Core S&P Mid-Cap ETF (NYSE: IJH), have experienced a 13.39% gain YTD and a 32.56% increase over the past year. The launch of Amplify's new ETF provides investors with an opportunity to capitalize on this trend. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Revenue figures for Q3 2024 released by Kering.
Festi hf. to release Q3 2024 results on Oct 30, investor meeting on Oct 31.
news.summary: The global annual death toll due to air pollution has reached a staggering 7 million, with more than 90% of the world's population breathing unsafe air outdoors. The economic cost of air pollution, including healthcare, welfare, and lost productivity, is estimated to be around $5 trillion annually. Furthermore, studies have shown that exposure to air pollution increases the risk of stroke, heart disease, lung cancer, and respiratory illnesses, making it a major public health concern. Authorities and policymakers are being urged to take immediate action to improve air quality and reduce the detrimental effects of pollution on human health.

news.headline: BUREAU VERITAS reports robust Q3 2024 revenue growth, reflecting strategy alignment; optimistic 2024 outlook revised.
ARGAN secures 2 new leases in Tours and Béziers as part of its expanding "Tour de France" operations.
Michelin reported decrease in sales due to downturn in OE markets and challenges in Specialties, despite improved mix.
